deals.title: 8449 Coughran Rd
deals.notes: Estate sale, cash transaction $152,000. Lien resolved Apr 21. Funded Apr 26, closed Apr 27.
deals.next: Deliver gift basket to Joyce. Thank Sam VanDenheuvel and Michael (notary).

logs.m: Closed and funded. Estate rep Joyce signed at UPS Store.
Lien release signed by Fernando Castillo at mobile notary. Delivered to Chicago Title.
Spoke with Fabian Cerrillo (lien holder family). Willing to work with us.

deals.title: Steve Jimenez - Tilden 20ac
deals.notes: 20-acre hunting property. Price adjusted to $117,500. First offer dead (Michael Rodriguez). Clearing complete. Lead with net after close on next offer.
deals.next: Follow up with Steve. When next offer comes, lead with net after close, not gross price.

logs.m: Price amendment signed ($117,500). Exclusions locked. Agent and buyer outreach in progress.
Clearing complete. First offer dead. Michael Rodriguez/RBFCU stalled, no earnest money.
Current offer basically dead. Steve more open to overall picture on offers.

deals.title: 181 CR 7751
deals.notes: Bank-owned property. Cleanup active. Drywall ready. Utilities: Medina Electric Cooperative and East Medina County SUD confirmed. Listing agreement needed to Jerry Sadler and Ray Stidham.
deals.next: Get transformer number on-site tomorrow. Submit Medina Electric application. Water callback expected. Finalize listing paperwork.

logs.m: Cleanup active, floor demo complete, drywall ready. Utility providers confirmed. Transformer number to grab tomorrow.
On-site visit. Met Bryce (dumpster contractor). His wife is active military - VA buyer opportunity.
Work officially starting. San Antonio Remodelers dropping dumpsters this weekend.

deals.title: 340 Sollock Dr
deals.notes: Underwater by $93K-$143K. Vacant 6 months. Double-carrying. Market value $350K-$400K, payoff ~$493K. Three options presented. Awaiting seller decision.
deals.next: Call broker first. Then call Matt and Chandler with three path options. Get decision on which path to pursue.

logs.m: Where Things Stand email sent to sellers. Three options outlined with financial details.
Buyer showing scheduled. Outside agent showing property.
Market analysis complete. Comp 717 Jack Nicklaus at $519K makes current $528,999 price impossible.

deals.title: Mike & Alice Howell
deals.notes: Rental being sold. Pivoting to new construction. No HOA requirement. Pre-approval status with Zach Schaphorst unknown. Sent showingnew.com new construction platform.
deals.next: Confirm pre-approval with Zach. Set up new construction search. Identify builders with no HOA.

logs.m: Sent showingnew.com/chrisdrawdy. Rental clock ticking. Need to move fast.
Text from Mike - rental being sold, duplex renovated, rents going up. Pivoting to new construction.

deals.title: Colton & Abigail Brown
deals.notes: Divorce situation. 4.05 acres, 3/2, 1,809 sqft. Payoff ~$257K. Need ~$285K-$290K to walk with proceeds. CMA pulled. Meeting today May 15 at 10am.
deals.next: Get updated payoff letter from lender. Get listing agreement signed. Schedule professional photos.

logs.m: Met at property. Payoff confirmed $255,578 as of Feb 2026. CMA pulled - thin market, 3 comps.
Prior VA loan clients. Going through divorce. Need to finish renovation and sell.

deals.title: 10023 Mill Path
deals.notes: 3BR/2.5BA. Relocating to NC second week of June. Motivated seller. List price $259,900. Insurance adjuster roof claim in progress. First showing feedback received - cultural concern flagged.
deals.next: Monitor for second showing or offer. Roof decision pending with insurance adjuster. Follow up with MK on buyer feedback.

logs.m: MLS live. Sign and lockbox dropped. Canvassed neighborhood. First showing - Filipino buyers, cultural concern, contacted MK.
Insurance adjuster out May 11 - claim moving forward for new roof.
Listing agreement signed. Photos in from ATG. Going live May 13.

deals.title: 00 Borregas
deals.notes: Land/development opportunity. Title defect: deed has incomplete legal description. Attorney Van Hutchins preparing Correction Deed. Isaac Linares interested in mobile home development (~$150K). Sisters excited about development angle.
deals.next: Pull listing agreement - check who signed. Call sisters - confirm listing extension decision. Follow up with Isaac on mobile home timeline.

logs.m: Isaac looking at 10-acre lot development with mobile homes. Josh LT potential partner - connect them.
Jennifer Ball took initiative - hired attorney Van Hutchins, pulled records, confirmed title defect.
Updated sisters on showing. Discussed Isaac development angle. Sisters enthusiastic.

deals.title: Moran - New Construction
deals.notes: Brandon Moran connection. Mom buying new construction. Budget $50K down, target ~$1K/month payment. Builder rate buydowns are the angle. Buyer rep signed May 7. Inventory being pulled.
deals.next: Follow up with Milagros - ask Brandon what is going on with her timeline. Confirm if she reviewed MI Homes option.

logs.m: Need to follow up with Milagros on progress and interest level.
MI Homes option from Frank found home keeping payments under $1,200/mo. Multiple builder options in progress.
Buyer rep signed. Rental setup docs also in folder for 8527 Green Bliss.

deals.title: 8527 Green Bliss
deals.notes: 1,535 sqft, 3/2.5BA, brand new Lennar home. Rent $1,595/month. HOA $300/quarter. Grace Gardens. Listing agreement must go out today. All Q&A answered by Jimbo.
deals.next: Finalize listing agreement in Skyslope and send for signatures. Order vinyl signs for property.

logs.m: All 12 listing agreement questions answered by Jimbo same day. Ready to send formal agreement.
Intro email sent to Jimbo with CMA and market breakdown. Waiting on responses.
Brandon notified - Jimbo rental listing next in queue.

leads.title: Kurt - 9815 Conbes
leads.detail: Neighbor spoke with Chris about nearby listing at 9815 Conbes. Wants intel on offers and deal details. Possible seller or buyer lead.
leads.next: Call Kurt - clarify situation at 9815 Conbes. Pull CMA for his area.

logs.m: Priority #2 today - pull CMA and follow up with listing agent on 9815 Conbes.
Met around corner from 9815 Conbes. Interested in nearby listing details.

leads.title: Sallie Mae F.
leads.detail: Community connection through garden share group. Grief to healing through plants story. Potential content collaboration and long-term real estate relationship.
leads.next: Follow up personally. Ask permission to share her story on social media.

logs.m: Garden community connection - healing and plants story angle.

leads.title: Isaac - Investor
leads.detail: Isaac Linares, Linares Capital LLC. Development interest in Borregas property (mobile home project). Also exploring VA loan assumption and owner finance options. Met in person at lunch meeting.
leads.next: Full intake call - buy box, budget, timeline. Confirm mobile home project details for Borregas offer.

logs.m: 10-acre lot development with mobile homes. Josh LT potential partner.
Lunch meeting with Chris and Isaac - discussed Borregas development. Partner Adam also present.

leads.title: Christina Shine - 13810 Tangle Tree
leads.detail: Met at garden event May 9. Has property at 13810 Tangle Tree St, ~90% complete. Plans to sell soon. Currently working with another realtor. Open to selling as-is or finishing.
leads.next: Follow up - check in on finishing progress. Offer to promote to Chris network if opportunity opens.

logs.m: Garden event meeting. Property near completion. Already has realtor but open to conversation.

leads.title: Miss Pat's Neighbor - Son
leads.detail: Property behind Miss Pat (neighbor). Deceased owner was avid gardener. Son now owns house. Probate or inherited property - son may want to sell.
leads.next: Get son name and contact from Miss Pat. Reach out with garden community connection angle.

logs.m: Miss Pat mentioned neighbor may have passed. Son owns property now. Previous owner loved gardening.

leads.title: Bryce - Active Military VA Buyer
leads.detail: Met on-site at 181 CR 7751. Dumpster contractor. Wife is active military - VA loan eligible. Recently moved from Ohio, currently renting. Looking to buy in San Antonio area.
leads.next: Get Bryce contact info on next 181 CR site visit. Qualify wife for VA eligibility. Send VA Buyers Guide.

logs.m: On-site meeting at Priority Bank property. Wife is active military. Recently relocated from Ohio.

leads.title: Jerome Gardner - Fixer Buyer
leads.detail: Jerome Gardner, downline agent (Schertz/Cibolo). Has buyer interested in fixer property. Unique situation - details pending.
leads.next: Follow up with Jerome - get full details on buyer and fixer property needs.

logs.m: Caught up with Jerome. Buyer needs fixer property. Details pending.

leads.title: Brandon Moran
leads.detail: Long-standing relationship - Chris helped Brandon get into real estate. Two active opportunities: 8527 Green Bliss rental listing (uncle James Stringer) and mom (Milagros) new construction buyer.
leads.next: Confirm Wed/Thu visit to Grace Gardens with Brandon and mom. Register as buyer agent before visit. Send PM options.

logs.m: Rental listing coordination. Mom Milagros new construction buyer. Grace Gardens builder visit planned.
Offered PM options and rental listing support. Building multi-opportunity relationship.

priorities.title: 340 Sollock Dr - Seller Path Decision
priorities.sub: Critical decision needed on short sale vs price reduction vs cash to close
priorities.notes: Sellers underwater $93K-$143K. Three options presented. Must talk to broker first, then call Matt/Chandler with decision requirements.

followUps.text: Call broker - discuss short sale protocol and path forward
Call Matt Gamez and Chandler Grulli with three options
Get seller decision on which path they have appetite for

priorities.title: 181 CR 7751 - Utility Setup and Listing
priorities.sub: Get utilities live and finalize listing paperwork
priorities.notes: Cleanup active. Transformer number needed tomorrow. Water callback expected morning. Listing agreement to Jerry Sadler and Ray Stidham.

followUps.text: Get transformer number on-site tomorrow morning
Submit Medina Electric application for new meter install
Confirm water service with EMCSUD callback
Finalize and send listing agreement to Jerry/Ray
Get Bryce contact info for VA buyer opportunity

priorities.title: Colton Brown - Listing Launch
priorities.sub: Get payoff letter, listing agreement signed, photos scheduled
priorities.notes: Met today May 15. Payoff ~$257K confirmed. CMA done. Net sheet built. Ready for listing agreement and photos.

followUps.text: Get updated payoff letter from lender
Get listing agreement signed
Schedule professional photos
Discuss contractor opportunity at 181 CR 7751

priorities.title: 8527 Green Bliss - Rental Listing Live
priorities.sub: Send listing agreement today - critical path item
priorities.notes: All 12 Q&A answered by Jimbo May 14. Ready to finalize agreement in Skyslope. Order vinyl signs.

followUps.text: Finalize listing agreement in Skyslope
Send for signatures to Jimbo and team
Order vinyl signs for property
Coordinate professional photos or use builder photos

priorities.title: New Construction Buyer Pipeline
priorities.sub: Milagros (Brandon connection) and Mike/Alice Howell - get pre-approvals and builder visits
priorities.notes: Two hot new construction opportunities. Milagros buyer rep signed. Mike/Alice urgent due to rental sale. Both need pre-approval confirmation and builder model visits.

followUps.text: Confirm pre-approval status with Zach Schaphorst for Mike/Alice
Follow up with Milagros on buyer rep progress
Set up new construction search platforms for both
Schedule Grace Gardens builder visit with Brandon and mom
Register as buyer agent on first builder visit - critical
